title: AI can speed up cancer drug discovery: Dr Attri
description: Excelsior Correspondent SRINAGAR, June 8: Head of the Department of Surgery at Govt Medical College (GMC), Srinagar, Prof. (Dr.) M.R. Attri today said artificial intelligence has the potential to significantly accelerate the discovery of new anti-cancer drugs, while stressing the need for close collaboration among clinicians, data scientists and biomedical researchers. Prof. Attri was addressing the valedictory session of an advanced workshop on “AI-Driven Drug Discovery in Various Cancers and In Vitro Validation for Translational Research: Towards Viksit Bharat @2047” […]
content:
